svg.title: JL Mixing Studio revised product wireframe
svg.desc: Fifteen desktop wireframe panels showing the approved application shell, client-to-project navigation, project workflow screens, and derived activity, priority, and task views.
svg.text: JL Mixing Studio — revised product wireframe
Approved navigation hierarchy, client screens, project workflow, and authoritative derived views

g.text: What do I need to work on today?
Priorities, health, actions, and activity use approved sources or show Planned.
New revision created — Midnight EP R5
Unsupported edit, workspace, storage, and diagnostic controls remain Planned.
Select a client to view details and projects
Selecting a project opens Project Overview
Showing 1–4 • Select any row → same Project Overview route
Search, client filter, workflow status, revision, and delivery context are retained.
Review current Revision 3; it is newer than approved Revision 2.
Projects remains active; client breadcrumb preserves where the project was selected.
Retains report summary, validation detail, warnings, and planned action.
History, detail, notes, files, and approved future actions are retained.
Delivery timestamp feeds Activity; all write actions remain planned.
Retains overview, contents, manifest, checksums, and action layout.
Derived from authoritative state; never stored separately
Revision 5 is newer than approved R4.
No completion checkbox; refresh removes a task when its source condition clears.
Category counts, task reason, project, and next action are retained.
Generated authoritative reports across the workspace
Retains report type, project, client/date filtering, search, and update context.
Reconstructed from validated persisted event timestamps
Not a complete audit log; failed, cancelled, and read-only actions are omitted.
Retains event filters, search, time, project, and durable-result context.
Settings retain full information architecture; all mutations remain deferred.
Application preferences remain distinct from studio.json configuration.
Projects list also opens the same Project Overview route.
Validated client, project, revision, delivery metadata
plus project deadlines and recovery errors
Health → overdue → delivery → due soon → review
Full derived action list from the same conditions
